messages.content: You are an expert insurance claims processor.
Process this auto claim: Claim #12345, John Doe, 2020 Toyota Camry, accident on 2024-03-15, front bumper and headlight damage, police report filed, repair estimate $3,200.
You are an expert insurance claims processor.
Process this property claim: Claim #54321, Jane Smith, water damage to basement, discovered 2024-02-20, caused by burst pipe, estimated damage $15,000, home built 1995.
You are an expert insurance claims processor.
Process this liability claim: Claim #77777, ABC Store, slip and fall incident, customer injured on wet floor, no warning signs visible, medical bills $8,500, incident on 2024-01-10.
